channel.title: Hacker News Front-Page Briefing
channel.description: Brief summaries of top Hacker News front-page stories, linked articles, and sampled HN discussion.

item.title: 1. GPT-5.6 used a prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization
item.description:
reddit.com | 238 points | 120 comments | by mbustamanter | 3 hours ago
Article: Log in 15 Jul 2026 705 Submit a new link Submit a new text post 18 years MODERATORS Welcome to Reddit, Become a Redditor and join one of thousands of communities. 704 706 After OpenAI's CDC proof announcement, GPT-5.6 used a similar prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization, verified in Lean 2 days ago 166 comments Want to add to the discussion?
HN reaction: HN discussion highlights: This conjecture reads as somewhat more niche than the cyclic double cover conjecture recently proved by OpenAI, but nevertheless represents a real contribution. This proof apparently shows that the lower bound time complexity is equal to the time complexity of an existing 30-year old algorithm: it requires Omega(d^2) function evaluations to solve over this class of functions.
Discussion: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48957779
item.author: mbustamanter
